title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Asian Paints Signature Store

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Asian Paints Signature Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
